body: # Four key takeaways from Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair

![Image 1: Getty Images Outgoing Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell wearing a white shirt and dark suit jacket readjusts his glasses while speaking to the press. ](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/news/480/cpsprodpb/dfd7/live/ddeb2720-43ea-11f1-9113-1988573e8ff7.jpg.webp)Getty Images
The Federal Reserve has held US interest rates steady after what was expected to be Jerome Powell's final meeting as chair.
